title: From Static Website to Growth Engine
description: How we transformed a legacy static website into a lead-generating powerhouse for a luxury real estate brand in Hyderabad.
challenge: The client had a slow, non-responsive website that failed to capture leads or represent their premium brand image effectively.
solution: We developed a high-performance Next.js platform with custom property search, WhatsApp automation, and SEO optimization.
results: 90% faster page load times (Core Web Vitals passed)
Ranked #1 for targeted local real estate keywords

title: Building a Scalable Learning Experience
description: Designing and developing a custom LMS that handles thousands of students with automated certification and progress tracking.
challenge: Existing platforms were either too generic or too expensive to scale with their custom course structures.
solution: Built a bespoke LMS using React and Node.js, focusing on mobile-first learning and automated student workflows.

title: Streamlining Hiring & HR Operations
description: Automating the entire recruitment lifecycle and employee management for a fast-growing logistics company.
challenge: Manual processes for hiring and payroll were causing significant delays and data inaccuracies.
solution: Implemented a custom HRMS with integrated ATS (Applicant Tracking System), payroll automation, and employee self-service portal.
results: Zero payroll errors in the first 12 months

title: Modernizing SKU Management & Sales
description: Developing a custom SKU-based e-commerce platform for a retail brand with complex inventory needs.
challenge: Managing 10,000+ SKUs across multiple locations was impossible with their off-the-shelf Shopify setup.
solution: Developed a custom headless e-commerce solution with advanced inventory synchronization and SKU management.
results: Unified dashboard for retail and online channels
